steps.title: Track the timeline
steps.content: The passage moves from Shakespeare's likely arrival in London as early as 1585, to his growing fame by 1593, to a play performed in 1599. The final sentence needs a transition showing later time.

steps.title: Pick the time transition
steps.content: Choice A signals restatement, Choice B signals contrast, and Choice C signals consequence. The 1599 event is not a rephrasing, opposition, or result; it simply occurs after 1593. The answer is D.
